reasoning: XLK up 1.37% while SPY up only 0.67% = tech outperformance and risk-on signal. However, XLF flat at +0.19% and XLE at +0.29% show no financial or energy participation. Narrow tech leadership without broad sector confirmation. Bullish tilt from tech dominance but medium confidence due to lack of secondary sector support — financials especially should be up if this is a sustained risk-on rotation.
key_observations: XLK: +1.37% — tech leadership driving premarket rally, strong risk-on signal
XLF: +0.19% — financials essentially flat, not confirming broad risk-on rotation
XLE: +0.29% — energy neutral, no defensive shift
Overall rotation: Risk-on driven by tech sector only; lacks multi-sector breadth for high-conviction bullish day
